captions_untagged.explicit: Homecoming weekend at Mount Union is always the highlight of the year. Watching the cheer squad parade by brings back so many memories of my own graduation day.
captions_untagged.moderate: It's so fun catching up with the old social circle during alumni weekend. The campus is buzzing, and it’s honestly nice to see the new generation keeping the traditions alive.
captions_untagged.no_leak: There’s such an incredible energy on campus right now. The purple and white balloons everywhere really set the mood for a perfect afternoon of celebrations.
